subject: Quick question about Luxe Mane Salon's digital presence
body:
Hi there,

I noticed your website is slightly behind https://www.londonsalonelite.example.com in page speed, which is costing you local searches in London. We specialize in high-end, fast React sites that capture high-net-worth clients.

Do you have 10 minutes to chat next week?


Best,

Karm Joshi | Executive | FourIqTech
